Orbital Express

Appearance

Orbital ExpressBuild production APIs, faster.

An opinionated Express.js + Sequelize framework with feature-folder architecture, built-in auth, background jobs, and real-time support.

Get Started
View on GitHub
📁

Feature-Folder Architecture

Everything for a feature lives in one folder. No bouncing between controllers/, models/, routes/. Scale to hundreds of features without chaos.

⚡

Generator-First

Never hand-create files. yarn gen Order scaffolds the entire feature — model, routes, controller, actions, tests — in seconds.

🔐

Auth Built In

Dual-token JWT auth (access + refresh) with per-client audience isolation. User and Admin portals out of the box.

🔄

Background Jobs

Bull/Redis queue built into the framework. Actions enqueue work, tasks process it. Separate worker process, retry logic included.

📡

Real-Time Ready

Socket.IO integrated at the framework level. Emit after commit. Room-based broadcasting. Testable socket actions. Read more →

🤖

AI-Native Skills

18 .claude/skills/ playbooks. Junior engineers describe what they need, the AI agent follows the playbook end-to-end.
